message:
refactor(http): inline percent encoding and remove dead helper

percent_encode() previously called percent_encode_byte() which
allocated a new String per non-unreserved byte via format!(). Now uses
std::fmt::Write to write directly into the output String, avoiding
per-byte allocation. The standalone percent_encode_byte() function is
removed as it had no other callers. Initial capacity also adjusted to
account for expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
